nuggets.text: FlexClip Free includes 720p downloads, a free trial of AI features, one stock video and one stock audio per project, a 12-project save limit, and videos up to 10 minutes.
Plus is priced at $11.99 monthly or $19.99 monthly-equivalent without annual savings and adds 1080p downloads, unlimited projects, no watermark, Brand Kit, custom fonts, and up to 100 templates.
Plus also includes 3600 AI credits per year, FlexClip premium resources, 30GB cloud space, 100GB video hosting space, and up to 5 stock videos and 5 stock audio items per project.
Business is priced at $19.99 monthly and adds 4K downloads, 9600 AI credits per year, unlimited stock video and audio, 100GB cloud space, and 1TB video hosting space.
The Business plan also increases saved templates to 200 and preserves no-watermark export with unlimited video length.
The pricing FAQ says exceeding your plan's stock-video limit per project can add a FlexClip watermark even on higher plans if the resource usage exceeds plan limits.
The features page frames FlexClip as an easy-to-use editor for trim, music, text, voiceover, merger, watermarking, aspect ratio, resolution, and slideshow-style assembly.
FlexClip also highlights media-library access to millions of stock photos, footage, and music for template-led business and social workflows.

Feature copy emphasizes simple browser editing tools such as split, rotate, zoom, transitions, filters, speed control, text animation, and photo-to-video rather than heavy professional post-production.
FlexClip's pricing page offers a 7-day money-back guarantee and uses SSL-secured checkout for subscription purchases.
